desc: I am 24 years old and I am based in Lyon since I'm born. I’ve always been fascinated by technology. Ever since I was a child, I’ve spent hours exploring computers, learning how things work and playing video games. This early passion naturally led me to study computer science, where I discovered a real appetite for problem-solving and creativity.

Outside of tech, I’m an active person who loves sports! running, cycling, and weightlifting are part of my weekly routine. They help me stay focused, disciplined, and motivated. I’d describe myself as curious, enthusiastic, and always eager to learn something new, whether it’s a new programming concept or a personal challenge to take on.
Here are a few glimpses of what I enjoy doing in my free time, from running and training to exploring the hills around Lyon.
